messages.content: Rewrite this sentence to be clearer: We done deploy and now users maybe can login.

Analyze these logs and identify likely root cause:
2026-03-01T10:00:00Z INFO app boot
2026-03-01T10:00:02Z WARN db retry 1
2026-03-01T10:00:03Z ERROR db timeout
2026-03-01T10:00:04Z ERROR request failed
Write a TypeScript function that returns the factorial of n recursively. Keep it short.
Compare optimistic vs pessimistic locking in one paragraph.
